sglang.title: Organize Benchmark
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
What does this PR do?

Simplified the benchmark code by reusing some common parts of dispatching different backends.
Add LMQL benchmark code for most of the benchmarks.
Add a progress bar for better visuals.

vllm.title: Disable cuda version check in vllm-openai image
vllm.author: zhaoyang-star
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #4521
Currently we no need to check cuda version when using fp8 kv cache. As of now, vLLM's binaries are compiled with CUDA 12.1 and public PyTorch release versions by default. The vllm-openai image has also CUDA 12.1.
